steps.title: Identify the key signal describing the friend's calm
steps.content: The friend's soul is laid (calmed) “by the lack of anvil and strife.” The phrase invokes struggle and hard work only to mark their absence—the friend's peace depends on NOT experiencing these things.

steps.title: Match the signal to the answer choices
steps.content: D identifies the exact function: “anvil and strife” represent the opposite of the friend's current tranquility. A reverses the meaning, while B and C address other poem elements. That confirms D is correct.
